title: 2021年度 第1回検定一次試験 英検準2級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを、放送される1, 2, 3の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Welcome back, James. How was your trip to Germany?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Not so good, actually. I caught a cold there.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Oh no. Are you better now?

questions.explanation: 具合が良くなったか聞かれ、もう完全に大丈夫と答えるのが自然です。
highlights: Are you better now?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「明日出発する」→体調の話。選択肢2「前にも行った」→体調。選択肢3「完全に元気」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hello. Columbus Police Department.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hi. I found a wallet. Can you tell me what to do?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes. But first, please tell me where you found it.

choices: It has a flower design on it.
questions.explanation: どこで見つけたか聞かれ、学校の裏と場所を答えるのが適切です。
highlights: where you found it
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「9時だった」→場所を聞いている。選択肢2「花柄のデザイン」→場所。選択肢3「学校の裏」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Do you have any plans for Friday night, Matt?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Not really. I was thinking of staying home and watching TV.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm playing soccer with my friends. Why don't you come with us?

choices: Yes, I've watched that program before.
Sounds like fun. I'll think about it.
questions.explanation: 友達とサッカーに誘われ、楽しそうだと前向きに検討するのが自然です。
highlights: Why don't you come with us?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「その番組を見た」→サッカーの誘い。選択肢2「楽しそう、考えてみる」→正解。選択肢3「金曜の夕食前」→誘いへの返答。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I heard our office is getting new computers next week.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Really? I'm so happy. Mine is very slow.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Mine, too. How long have you been using yours?

choices: Let's see. It must be five years now.
Well, it takes about five minutes.
questions.explanation: どのくらい使っているか聞かれ、5年くらいと答えるのが適切です。
highlights: How long have you been using yours?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「もう5年くらい」→正解。選択肢2「5分くらいかかる」→使用期間。選択肢3「サイズが好き」→使用期間。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Welcome to Smith's Vegetables. Are you looking for something?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes. I need two big pumpkins, some potatoes, and some onions.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: We have fresh onions and potatoes, but no pumpkins.

choices: I see. I'll go home to get more money, then.
I see. I'll tell you when they arrive, then.
I see. I'll take what you've got, then.
questions.explanation: カボチャはないがタマネギとジャガイモはあると聞いて、あるものを買うと答えるのが自然です。
highlights: We have fresh onions and potatoes, but no pumpkins
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「お金を取りに帰る」→あるものを買う。選択肢2「届いたら教える」→客側がやること。選択肢3「あるものを買う」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What are you doing this afternoon, Jonathan?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Well, I was thinking of going swimming.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That sounds like fun. Can I come, too?

questions.explanation: 一緒に行っていいか聞かれ、もちろんと歓迎するのが自然です。
highlights: Can I come, too?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「昨日行った」→一緒に行くかの返答。選択肢2「病気」→泳ぎに行く予定。選択肢3「もちろん」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hello, Dr. Lewis. My foot feels a little better today.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: That's good, Helen.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: But it still hurts when I walk.

choices: I'll see you again next time.
OK. Let me look at it.
questions.explanation: 歩くとまだ痛いと言われ、診てみましょうと答えるのが適切です。
highlights: it still hurts when I walk
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「予約が変更された」→痛みの訴え。選択肢2「次回に」→今痛い。選択肢3「診てみましょう」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hi. I'd like to exchange these jeans.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Is there a problem with them, ma'am?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Actually, they're too small for me. Do you have them in a larger size?

choices: Yes, these are the only size.
Maybe. Let me check for you.
questions.explanation: 大きいサイズがあるか聞かれ、確認してみると答えるのが適切です。
highlights: Do you have them in a larger size?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「これだけのサイズ」→確認してみる。選択肢2「確認してみる」→正解。選択肢3「セール中」→サイズの話。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hi, Bill. This is Bridget. There's something wrong with my computer.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: It's making a strange noise. Can you come over and look at it?

choices: No, my computer is right here.
OK, I'll be there in a few minutes.
Well, you should turn it on.
questions.explanation: 見に来てほしいと頼まれ、すぐ行くと答えるのが適切です。
highlights: Can you come over and look at it?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「ここにある」→来てほしい。選択肢2「すぐ行く」→正解。選択肢3「電源を入れて」→変な音がする。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Can I borrow your math textbook, Ayaka?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sure, David. It's in my bag. I'll get it for you.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Thanks, I'll give it back to you tomorrow.

choices: No problem. Just give it to me before my class.
No way. I don't like studying there.
Not yet. Please wait for me.
questions.explanation: 明日返すと言われ、授業前に返してねと条件をつけるのが自然です。
highlights: I'll give it back to you tomorrow
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「授業前に返してね」→正解。選択肢2「あそこで勉強したくない」→返す話。選択肢3「まだ待って」→貸す承諾済み。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Julie. This is Brian. I have a question to ask you.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sure, Brian. What is it?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Will you go to the school dance with me on Friday night?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'm sorry, Brian. Greg already asked me to go with him.

questions.question: What does Brian want Julie to do?
choices: Go to the school dance with him.
Meet him after school on Friday.
questions.explanation: 金曜の夜のスクールダンスに一緒に行ってほしいと頼んでいます。
highlights: Will you go to the school dance with me
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「一緒にスクールダンスに行く」→正解。選択肢2「宿題を手伝う」→ダンス。選択肢3「放課後に会う」→ダンス。選択肢4「Gregを紹介」→ダンスに誘った。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm leaving now, Mom. I'll be back before ten o'clock.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Where are you going, Brad?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I'm taking Judy to a movie. We're going to see Lonely Streets.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Well, don't forget your student ID card if you want the student discount.

questions.question: What does Brad's mother tell him to do?
questions.explanation: 学割を使いたいなら学生証を忘れないようにと言っています。
highlights: don't forget your student ID card
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「10時前に帰る」→学生証。選択肢2「レストランに連れていく」→映画。選択肢3「別の映画」→学生証。選択肢4「学生証を持っていく」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hello? Maggie speaking.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Maggie. It's Ben. Would you like to come over to my house for dinner this weekend?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'd love to. I have to help my brother with his homework on Saturday, but I'm free on Sunday. How about six?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Great. See you on Sunday, then.

questions.question: What will Maggie do on Sunday?
choices: Go to Ben's house for dinner.
questions.explanation: 日曜日にBenの家で夕食を食べに行きます。
highlights: come over to my house for dinner
I'm free on Sunday
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「弟の勉強を手伝う」→土曜日。選択肢2「Benに夕食を作る」→Benの家で食事。選択肢3「Benの家で夕食」→正解。選択肢4「レストランで会う」→Benの家。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Excuse me, driver. How much is the taxi fare to the airport?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Around 40 dollars.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hmm, that's a little expensive. But I'm too tired to take the train. OK, take me to the airport.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Let me help you with your bag.

questions.question: Why does the woman decide to take a taxi to the airport?
choices: She is too tired for the train.
questions.explanation: 電車に乗るには疲れすぎているからタクシーにしました。
highlights: I'm too tired to take the train
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「安い」→高いと言った。選択肢2「電車が動いていない」→疲れている。選択肢3「荷物が多い」→疲れている。選択肢4「電車に乗るには疲れている」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Oh, what happened? What are those red spots on your legs?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: They're from insect bites. It happened while I was camping with my father at Red Fern Lake.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: They look like they hurt. Have you seen a doctor?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Actually, they don't hurt at all. My doctor gave me some special cream to put on them. They should be better soon.

questions.question: How did the girl get red spots on her legs?
questions.explanation: キャンプ中に虫に刺されて赤い斑点ができました。
highlights: They're from insect bites
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「虫に刺された」→正解。選択肢2「ハイキング中に転んだ」→虫刺され。選択肢3「アレルギー反応」→虫刺され。選択肢4「日焼け」→虫刺され。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Jessica. Welcome home. Your friend Dan called three times today.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Thanks, Dad. Does he want me to call him back?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No, he said he'd call again after dinner.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Well, I'll call him now anyway. We're supposed to study together tomorrow.

questions.question: What will Jessica do next?
questions.explanation: Danに今すぐ電話すると言っています。
highlights: I'll call him now anyway
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「テスト勉強」→明日一緒に。選択肢2「Danの電話を待つ」→今すぐ電話する。選択肢3「Danと夕食」→電話する。選択肢4「Danに電話する」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Excuse me. I bought this CD player here a year ago, but it stopped working recently.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I see. I can fix it for you, but you will have to pay for it. Is that OK?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: That's fine. How long will it take?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: A couple of weeks. Please write your name and phone number here, and I'll call you when it's ready.

questions.question: What will the man do for the woman?
questions.explanation: CDプレーヤーを修理してくれます。
highlights: I can fix it for you
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「CDプレーヤーを修理する」→正解。選択肢2「新しいものをくれる」→修理。選択肢3「返金」→有料で修理。選択肢4「部品を注文」→修理。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Excuse me. Do you have any toy cars at this store?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, ma'am. They're over here. We also have books and videos about cars.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Really? My son loves books about cars. I'll get him one of those instead of a toy.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: If you have any questions, please ask.

questions.question: What does the woman decide to buy?
questions.explanation: おもちゃの代わりに車の本を買うことにしました。
highlights: I'll get him one of those instead of a toy
My son loves books about cars
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「おもちゃの車」→本にした。選択肢2「車のビデオ」→本。選択肢3「車の本」→正解。選択肢4「車の雑誌」→本。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: This is Alpine Airways.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hello. I want to check if my plane will leave on time today. It's the flight to London at noon.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Let me check, sir. Yes, your flight will leave on time. Please come to the airport by ten o'clock.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: OK. Thank you.

questions.question: What is one thing we learn about the man?
choices: He is flying to London today.
He wants to change his seat.
He is at the airport now.
questions.explanation: 今日の正午にロンドンへのフライトに乗る予定です。
highlights: the flight to London at noon
your flight will leave on time
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「今日ロンドンに飛ぶ」→正解。選択肢2「飛行機を逃した」→定刻出発。選択肢3「座席を変えたい」→フライト確認。選択肢4「空港にいる」→10時までに来て。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you want to go to a movie tonight?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sure. Let's check the newspaper.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hmm. We can go to either a comedy or a science-fiction movie.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Let's see the comedy. I feel like watching something funny.

questions.question: What will these people probably do tonight?
questions.explanation: 今夜コメディ映画を見に行きます。
highlights: Let's see the comedy
I feel like watching something funny
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「家で新聞を読む」→映画に行く。選択肢2「コメディ映画を見る」→正解。選択肢3「SF番組を見る」→コメディ。選択肢4「コメディクラブ」→映画。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Olivia and Sam went to a Japanese restaurant for dinner last Saturday. However, when they got there, a waiter told them that the restaurant was full, so they went home and ordered a pizza and a Greek salad instead. In the end, they enjoyed their dinner while they watched a movie on the Internet.

questions.question: What did Olivia and Sam do on Saturday night?
choices: They ate at a Japanese restaurant.
They watched a movie at a theater.
They had pizza and salad at home.
questions.explanation: レストランが満席だったので家でピザとサラダを注文して映画を見ました。
highlights: went home and ordered a pizza and a Greek salad
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「日本食レストランで食べた」→満席。選択肢2「一緒に料理した」→注文した。選択肢3「映画館で映画」→自宅でネット。選択肢4「家でピザとサラダ」→正解（ただし1が正解）。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Thank you for coming on today's tour. We will soon be arriving at the city aquarium. Tickets to the aquarium will be handed to you when you get off the bus. Please keep them with you because you need to show them when we have lunch. If you lose your ticket, you will have to pay for your meal.

questions.question: What does the guide tell the tourists?
questions.explanation: チケットをなくすと食事代を払う必要があるので大切に保管するよう伝えています。
highlights: Please keep them with you
If you lose your ticket, you will have to pay
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「自分でチケットを買う」→配られる。選択肢2「バスに留まる」→降りる。選択肢3「チケットを大切に保管」→正解。選択肢4「今ランチ代を払う」→チケットがあれば不要。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Windmills are large machines that are moved by the wind. The first European-type windmills were made more than 800 years ago. In the Netherlands, people often used windmills as pumps to remove water from wet land so they could grow vegetables. These days, modern windmills are used to create electricity as well.

questions.question: What is one thing that we learn about windmills?
choices: They are no longer used today.
They have been used for 80 years.
They were used to remove water from land.
questions.explanation: オランダでは湿地から水を汲み出すためにポンプとして使われていました。
highlights: people often used windmills as pumps to remove water from wet land
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「アジアで発明」→ヨーロッパ型。選択肢2「もう使われていない」→今も使われている。選択肢3「80年」→800年以上。選択肢4「水を汲み出すために使われた」→正解。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: When Oscar woke up this morning, he saw that the buses, trains, and taxis had stopped because there was too much snow. He called his office and told his boss that he would be late because it would take a long time to walk to work. She said that Oscar should stay home and work on his computer there.

questions.question: Why did Oscar work from his home?
choices: His computer at work was broken.
Transportation had stopped due to snow.
His boss was working from home too.
questions.explanation: 大雪で交通機関が止まったので自宅で仕事をしました。
highlights: buses, trains, and taxis had stopped
too much snow
Oscar should stay home
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「会社のPCが壊れた」→雪。選択肢2「遅く寝たかった」→交通機関停止。選択肢3「雪で交通機関停止」→正解。選択肢4「上司も在宅」→雪で指示。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Before Tina and her family moved to another city, her father told her to throw away some of her comic books. Tina was upset, but she took them to a recycling center. After moving to the new city, Tina was surprised that she did not miss her old comic books at all. She was too busy making new friends.

questions.question: What did Tina do before she moved?
choices: She took her comic books to a recycling center.
She gave her comics to friends.
She packed all her books carefully.
questions.explanation: 引っ越し前に漫画をリサイクルセンターに持っていきました。
highlights: she took them to a recycling center
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「リサイクルセンターに持っていった」→正解。選択肢2「友達にあげた」→リサイクル。選択肢3「丁寧に梱包」→処分した。選択肢4「新しい漫画を買った」→処分した。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Canada is the second largest country in the world. It has beautiful mountains and interesting wild animals. Hikers from all around the world visit it for a special reason—it has more lakes than any other country on Earth. Beautiful trees often grow around the lakes, so hikers like to take pictures of them.

questions.question: Why do hikers from all around the world visit Canada?
questions.explanation: 世界のどの国よりも多くの湖があるからハイカーが訪れます。
highlights: it has more lakes than any other country on Earth
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「野生動物」→湖。選択肢2「山登り」→湖。選択肢3「木を研究」→湖の写真。選択肢4「多くの湖を訪問」→正解。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Risa is a junior high school student who enjoys playing basketball and volleyball. She is very good at both sports. Next year, she will be in high school and she has to choose one sport to play there. A friend told her to talk with her basketball coach because he always gives good advice.

questions.question: What did Risa's friend tell her to do?
choices: Play both sports in high school.
questions.explanation: バスケのコーチはいつもいいアドバイスをくれるから相談するよう勧めました。
highlights: A friend told her to talk with her basketball coach
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「両方やる」→1つ選ぶ。選択肢2「バレーを選ぶ」→コーチに相談。選択肢3「バスケのコーチに相談」→正解。選択肢4「別のチーム」→コーチ。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Pamela has been working part time at a supermarket for two years. Now, she is looking for a full-time job near her home. She found one online at a company that makes toys for children, but the company's office is far away from her home. She will keep on searching until she finds a job near her home.

questions.question: Why did Pamela decide not to work at the toy company?
choices: It is too far from her home.
She wants to stay at the supermarket.
questions.explanation: おもちゃ会社が家から遠すぎるからです。
highlights: the company's office is far away from her home
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「家から遠い」→正解。選択肢2「おもちゃ作りが嫌い」→遠い。選択肢3「給料が低い」→遠い。選択肢4「スーパーに残りたい」→正社員を探している。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: OK, everyone. The final match of today's video game tournament is about to start. There are only two players left, and the winner will take home the grand prize—$8,000! The game starts in five minutes, so please take your seats and enjoy the final match!

questions.question: What does the announcement ask audience members to do now?
choices: Buy tickets for the next event.
questions.explanation: 5分後に試合が始まるので席についてくださいと案内しています。
highlights: please take your seats
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「トーナメントに登録」→席に着く。選択肢2「席に着く」→正解。選択肢3「お気に入りに投票」→席に着く。選択肢4「チケットを買う」→席に着く。

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Polly wants to be a racecar driver after she graduates from high school. The reason is that her father had the same job until last year. She has watched videos of him and has often gone with him to watch cars racing at a track. Polly's mother wants her to become a nurse, but Polly is not interested in that.

questions.question: Why does Polly want to become a racecar driver?
choices: Her father was a racecar driver.
She saw a movie about racing.
questions.explanation: 父親が去年まで同じ仕事をしていたからです。
highlights: her father had the same job until last year
questions.choiceAnalysis: 選択肢1「レースに勝った」→父の影響。選択肢2「父がレーサーだった」→正解。選択肢3「母が勧めた」→母は看護師を望んでいる。選択肢4「レースの映画を見た」→父のビデオ。
